text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 218 

REBT_ELGBL_CD 

LABEL: Rebate Eligible Code 

DESCRIPTION: An indicator to identify claim lines with a National Drug Code (NDC) that is eligible for the drug rebate 
program. 

SHORT NAME: REBT_ELGBL_CD 

LONG NAME: REBT_ELGBL_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): RX line 

VALUES: 0 = NDC is not eligible for drug rebate program.
